src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.general_idea: Refactored the password reset endpoint to use query parameters instead of a request body DTO and changed the return type to Boolean.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.human_impl: @PutMapping("/reset_password") public ResponseEntity<Boolean> resetPassword(@RequestParam Map<String, Object> params) { ... }

src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.general_idea: Refactored the user registration endpoint to return a Boolean result indicating success instead of just a status code.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the lambda-based API introduced in Spring Security 5.7+.
Update authorization configuration to use the lambda-based API for request matching.
Update form login configuration to use the lambda-based API.
Update logout configuration to use the lambda-based API.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Enti.general_idea: The toDTO method signature is updated to declare checked exceptions related to MP3 file processing.
